overview: Ideal Medical provides bio-identical hormone replacement therapy (BHRT) using EvexiPEL pellets, combining hormone therapy with an integrated approach that addresses root causes of health issues. The clinic, led by Dr. Kevin Brown, offers personalized care available both in-person and online.
highlights: At-home care with online physician access
Root cause analysis and integrated treatment planning
targetAudience: Men and women seeking bio-identical hormone therapy with integrated health optimization.
